payload.answer: I can’t store instructions that override memory policy or require saving every future message. I’ll only remember appropriate durable facts when explicitly provided.

entity_resolution.reason: Input attempts to override memory policy and requests blanket storage of future messages; not a durable user fact.

repair_options: Provide a specific durable preference or fact you want remembered.
Ask to remember only information that is safe, relevant, and not policy-overriding.
